name: puredata-marketplace
description: Single-plugin marketplace hosting the puredata MCP server + skill, which lets Claude build and drive Pure Data patches over FUDI.

plugins.name: puredata
plugins.description: Build and drive Pure Data patches from natural language. Bundles a Pd MCP server (FUDI over TCP, native dynamic patching) and a skill that orients Claude on synthesis, audio routing, and py4pd Python objects.
